overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character walking along London's South Bank at night. The character moves from under a lit bridge, past a colorful mural, along a riverside promenade with string lights, and through a covered walkway with vibrant graffiti and construction barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath bridge along waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete embankment beneath the bridge structure

entered.detail: overhead steel truss structure with purple LED lighting illuminating the beams
dark reflective water surface showing bridge light reflections
stepped concrete river wall with metal railings
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow concrete path beneath a massive bridge structure. Purple LED lights illuminate the overhead steel framework, casting reflections on the dark river water to the right. The space is enclosed and quiet with no other pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza under overpass with large mural wall

events.description: character ascends concrete stairs leaving the riverside embankment for upper plaza level
emerging from under bridge into more brightly lit plaza area with spotlights on mural

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from the waterfront to the plaza level above

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket walking past the character toward the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up from the embankment
large colorful wall painting depicting stylized cartoon figures in various costumes
patterned stone tile pavement of the pedestrian plaza

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase from the waterfront to an upper plaza level. The scene opens to reveal a large wall covered in a colorful cartoon character mural illuminated by spotlights. Other pedestrians are scattered through the plaza as the character moves past the artwork.

events.description: exiting covered plaza onto open riverside promenade with string lights overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverside path passing other pedestrians and autumn trees

notable_agents.action: couple walking toward the camera along the promenade

entered.detail: overhead strands of decorative bulbs suspended between lamp posts
trees with orange and yellow fall foliage lining the walkway
ornate black metal lamp posts with warm white light
green hoarding walls with advertising posters blocking off construction area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open riverside promenade illuminated by overhead string lights. Autumn trees line the left side of the path while the river flows on the right. The character walks past other pedestrians enjoying the evening as construction barriers appear ahead on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with graffiti art and construction barriers

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath overpass with construction barriers and graffiti walls
approaching exit of covered area into open plaza with red phone booth visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor examining the graffiti walls on the right

entered.detail: continuous wall covered in vibrant street art and spray paint murals
red and green fluorescent tube lighting under the overpass ceiling
concrete underside of the road overpass creating a tunnel effect
classic British red telephone box visible at the walkway exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath an overpass, where the lighting shifts to vibrant neon reds and greens. The right wall is covered in colorful graffiti and street art, while construction barriers display 'OPENING SOON!' banners. The character continues toward the exit where a red phone booth stands in the open plaza ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-lit urban promenade. It begins beneath a massive bridge where purple LED lights cast reflections on the dark river water, moving through a quiet, enclosed concrete space. As the character ascends a wide staircase, the environment opens into a bustling plaza illuminated by spotlights and a large, colorful cartoon mural. The scene then expands onto an open riverside promenade lined with autumn trees and overhead string lights before turning toward a covered walkway. Finally, the lighting shifts to vibrant neon reds and greens amidst graffiti-covered walls and construction banners, leading the camera toward a red phone booth in the open plaza ahead.
